economic_notes: Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is a government business partnership (99.99% owned) operating a franchise-type business with revenue of $9,411,330 in 2024. Band also holds investments in All Nations Trust Company and Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost method). Band guaranteed LLP bank loan with outstanding balance of $2,139,830.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine appropriate accounting treatment for investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost vs modified equity method). Band consolidates Ashcroft Indian Band Holding Corporation as a wholly-owned subsidiary. Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP (99.99% owned) is accounted for using the modified equity method as a government business enterprise — not consolidated, reported separately with revenue of $9.4M. No long-term debt on Band's own balance sheet; LLP has long-term debt of $2,139,830 guaranteed by the Band. No schedule of remuneration provided. No budget presented as Band does not prepare one. Honoraria of $234,923 paid (likely to Chief and Council). Prior year ISC recovery of -$32,652 treated as $0 in revenue lines.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
